title: 安田記念の後に・新たながっぷり！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clash of titans has the crowd on the edge of
their seats! It seems people have realized Hishi
Akebono's races are in a league of their own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle and Hishi Akebono are just as
satisfied with their all-out battle for the finish
line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They swear that this won't be their last battle
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our next race is set for the Sprinters S. It's
time to prepare for the rematch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Hishi Akebono has noticed an odd
sensation in her legs.
